subcodes.first_line: O beloved ones of the All-Merciful and trustees of divine mysteries! By the life of Truth, verily the ocean of the Covenant hath surged and billowed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احباء الرحمن و امناء الاسرار لعمر الحق ان قلزم المیثاق قد هاج و ماج و
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @love and unity, @Greatest Name, @wisdom [hikmat]
